title: Record health workflow completion checkpoint
summary: Account for tracker-state edits that mark completed Health workflow tasks done after their implementation checkpoints. This task remains open until the local ace-workflows cleanup commit is explicitly pushed to GitHub.
acceptance_criteria: projects/health/tasks/index.json records health-001 and health-002 as done.
projects/health/tasks/health-001.json records completion of the health project scaffold.
projects/health/tasks/health-002.json records completion of the pushed registry and product-catalog slices.
Repository workflow-state validation passes for the completion checkpoint.
The completion checkpoint is committed and pushed to GitHub.
projects/health/tasks/health-005.json records completion of the standalone Philippines health coverage workflow repo checkpoint.
The local ace-workflows cleanup commit is pushed to GitHub after explicit checkpoint approval.

context_snapshot.summary: Completion checkpoint task opened because the validator requires changed tracker files to be linked to a non-done tracker-maintenance task. The primary health implementation task is health-002 and should remain done after this checkpoint.

session_log.event: Opened to account for the completion checkpoint after commit 9f966aa was pushed to GitHub.
Linked health-004 so the open tracker-maintenance task accounts for the new Health follow-on implementation-plan task.
Kept open to account for the Health 004 implementation checkpoint until the local commit and GitHub push complete.
Accounted for tracker follow-up marking health-004 done after implementation commit 939ebb4.
Linked health-005 so the open tracker-maintenance task accounts for the installable healthcare research skill-pack planning task.
Closed health-005 locally after the standalone philippines-health-coverage repo validation passed; this checkpoint remains open until the ace-workflows cleanup commit is pushed.
Linked health-006 so the open tracker-maintenance task accounts for the new standalone health workflow review task.
Linked the health-006 review, roadmap, and workflow-packet artifacts so the open checkpoint accounts for the completed review until the cleanup commit is pushed.
Accounted for the tracker follow-up marking health-006 done after review commit ee50449.
Linked health-008 so the open tracker-maintenance task accounts for the new standalone Health product UI task.

Deferred the private Health testing-session bundle from public integration after security review. The original session remains preserved only in the untouched source worktree; no private event text or machine paths are published.
